description: HomeConsole Caduceus public lever runtime. Rust owns caduceus source sync, cargo build, binary install, profile/policy/state convergence, caduceus.service standup, and HTTP health proof; this sidecar carries constants only.

managed_files.content:
[Unit]
Description=Caduceus LAN-open appliance API
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/caduceus serve
Environment=CADUCEUS_BIND=0.0.0.0:8787
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=2

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

{
  "schema": "caduceus.profile.v1",
  "profile": "console",
  "mode": "console",
  "harmonia_profile": "/etc/harmonia/profiles/homeconsole/index.json",
  "commands": [
    "help",
    "identity show",
    "profile show",
    "health",
    "receipts latest",
    "receipts ledger",
    "sync status",
    "sync now",
    "update status",
    "update check",
    "update now",
    "update service status",
    "update service toggle",
    "gui update now",
    "local-ai runtime status",
    "local-ai runtime check",
    "local-ai runtime update",
    "profile module toggle"
  ],
  "services": {
    "ledger": "/var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeconsole-ledger.jsonl",
    "update": {
      "timer": "harmonia-homeconsole.timer",
      "latest_receipt": "/var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeconsole-update-latest/run.json"
    },
    "sync": {
      "latest_receipt": "/var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeconsole-sync-latest/run.json"
    },
    "gui": {
      "latest_receipt": "/var/lib/harmonia/receipts/arcadia-gui-latest/run.json"
    },
    "local_ai": {
      "latest_receipt": "/var/lib/harmonia/receipts/local-ai-runtime-latest/run.json"
    }
  },
  "harmonia_routes": {
    "sync_now": {
      "bin": "/usr/local/bin/harmonia",
      "args": [
        "homeconsole-sync",
        "/etc/harmonia/profiles/homeconsole/index.json",
        "--module",
        "/etc/harmonia/profiles/homeconsole/modules/homeconsole-sync-runtime/sidecar.json",
        "--apply",
        "--receipt-dir",
        "/var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeconsole-sync-latest"
      ],
      "flags": {
        "--no-restart": [
          "--adapter-args",
          "--no-restart"
        ]
      }
    },
    "update_now": {
      "bin": "/usr/local/bin/harmonia",
      "args": [
        "homeconsole-update",
        "/etc/harmonia/profiles/homeconsole/index.json",
        "--apply",
        "--receipt-dir",
        "/var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeconsole-update-latest"
      ]
    },
    "update_check": {
      "bin": "/usr/local/bin/harmonia",
      "args": [
        "homeconsole-update",
        "/etc/harmonia/profiles/homeconsole/index.json",
        "--receipt-dir",
        "/var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeconsole-check-latest"
      ]
    },
    "gui_update_now": {
      "bin": "/usr/local/bin/harmonia",
      "args": [
        "homeconsole-arcadia-gui-update",
        "/etc/harmonia/profiles/homeconsole/index.json",
        "--repo",
        "git@git.home.arpa:HOMESERVERSLTD/arcadia.git",
        "--branch",
        "main",
        "--source-dir",
        "/opt/arcadia/source",
        "--apply",
        "--install-bin",
        "/usr/local/bin/arcadia",
        "--service",
        "arcadia.service",
        "--receipt-dir",
        "/var/lib/harmonia/receipts/arcadia-gui-latest"
      ]
    },
    "local_ai_update_now": {
      "bin": "/usr/local/bin/harmonia",
      "args": [
        "homeconsole-local-ai-update",
        "/etc/harmonia/profiles/homeconsole/index.json",
        "--apply",
        "--receipt-dir",
        "/var/lib/harmonia/receipts/local-ai-runtime-latest"
      ]
    }
  },
  "operator_aliases": {
    "sync": "caduceus sync now",
    "sync-no-restart": "caduceus sync now --no-restart",
    "update": "caduceus update now",
    "update-check": "caduceus update status",
    "update-status": "caduceus receipts latest",
    "update-gui": "caduceus gui update now",
    "local-ai-update": "caduceus local-ai runtime update",
    "health": "caduceus health",
    "h": "caduceus help"
  }
}

{
  "schema": "caduceus.policy.v1",
  "profile": "console",
  "allowed_public_actions": [
    "identity show",
    "profile show",
    "health",
    "receipts latest",
    "receipts ledger",
    "update status",
    "update check",
    "update now",
    "update service status",
    "update service toggle on",
    "update service toggle off",
    "gui update now",
    "local-ai runtime status",
    "local-ai runtime check",
    "local-ai runtime update",
    "profile module toggle"
  ],
  "private_land_organs_exposed": false
}
